name: Spanish Bean Dish
recipeIngredient: 2 large Cans red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the brandy and coffee.
2. Pour over beans in a large casserole or bean pot.
3. Stir; bake one hour at 250 F.
4. Slice an onion on top of the beans and bake for 20 minutes longer at 400 F.
5. Pour coffee over all and bake at 400 F for another 15 minutes.
6. Add brandy, pouring it over all.
7. Turn off oven and let dish stand in oven for 15 minutes until brandy has heated and blended.
8. Serve.
